meta.title: Hisham Ali Ahmed Abuzaid — Transport & Strategic Infrastructure

hero.kicker: Former Minister of Transport & Strategic Infrastructure Leader
hero.headline: Hisham Abuzaid
hero.lead: Executive leader with over two decades of experience in transportation, logistics, and public sector transformation. Led national-level infrastructure strategies and multi-agency initiatives in the Republic of Sudan.

vision.title: Strategic Stewardship
vision.p1: Senior executive specialized in transportation systems, public sector reform, and strategic project delivery. Proven ability to lead national initiatives, align stakeholders, and drive long-term economic impact.

items.title: National Transport Strategy
items.body: Led national transportation strategy at ministerial level, aligning infrastructure and policy execution across sectors.

items.title: Infrastructure & Public Transport Programs
items.body: Directed large-scale public transport and infrastructure initiatives across Sudan.

items.title: Institutional & Operational Reform
items.body: Managed complex multi-stakeholder operations and improved coordination across government entities.
